_comment: === STARTER DECK (ACT-001 to ACT-010) — all free-cost, ♠ basics + one per suit ===

name: Slash
description: A basic sword strike. Everyone knows this one.
_designNote: Starter. ♠ damage. Teaches the combat loop.

name: Block
description: 2 temp HP. Absorbs the next hit.
_designNote: Starter. Defensive baseline.

name: Mend
description: Restore 3 HP. Good in a pinch.
_designNote: Starter heal. Teaches HP resource.

name: Cinder Strike
description: A burning strike. ♠ enemies take ×1.5.
_designNote: Starter ♦. Introduces suit RPS advantage.

name: Frost Shard
description: A shard of ice. ♣ enemies take ×1.5.
_designNote: Starter ♠. Completes the suit trio.

name: Arc Bolt
description: A bolt of lightning. ♦ enemies take ×1.5.
_designNote: Starter ♣. Closes the suit RPS loop.

name: Embers
description: 2 damage + burn (1 DOT). The damage keeps giving.
_designNote: Starter status card. Introduces burn DOT.

name: Glacial Guard
description: 3 temp HP. Solid frost defense.
_designNote: Starter ♠ defense. Shows suit cards can also be defensive.

name: Thunder Clap
description: 4 ♣ damage. Loud. Effective.
_designNote: Starter ♣ heavy. Shows ♣ as raw damage suit.

name: Rummage
description: Draw 1 extra card this combat.
_designNote: Starter utility. Introduces card draw as a resource.

_comment: === CELLAR POOL (ACT-020 to ACT-034) — undead/organic, ♠/♣ theme ===

name: Bonepick
description: A harvested bone used as a weapon. Biologically efficient.
_designNote: Cellar common. Thematic — connects to necro-salvage loop.

name: Grave Chill
description: 3 ♠ damage + stun (1 turn). The cold settles in.
_designNote: Cellar ♠ control. Tide/Admiralty shops carry this.

name: Corpse Gas
description: 2 ♣ damage + poison. Smells awful. Works great.
_designNote: Cellar ♣ common. Poison DOT from undead environment.

name: Mold Web
description: 4 def + root enemy (skip action). Good for emergencies.
_designNote: Cellar ♠ control uncommon. Costs 1 energy.

name: Rat Swarm
description: 3 hits of 1 damage. Each hit triggers on-hit effects separately.
_designNote: Multi-hit card. Synergizes with DOT effects. Cellar thematic.

name: Amber Lock
description: Freeze enemy for 2 turns. Zero damage. Pure control.
_designNote: Pure CC ♠ card. Tide Council specialty.

name: Dead Weight
description: 6 damage. Slow swing, huge impact.
_designNote: Cellar high-damage ♠. Costs 1 energy.

name: Bone Shard
description: 4 damage + bleed (1 DOT). Pierces light armor.
_designNote: Cellar rare. dropTier 1 = requires Trusted rep to appear in shops.

name: Undying Will
description: +5 HP (only if below half health). The will to survive.
_designNote: Conditional heal — only triggers at <50% HP. Powerful but situational.

name: Crypt Shroud
description: 5 def + regen (2 HP/turn × 2). Frost armor that heals.
_designNote: Cellar ♠ rare. Tide Council tier-1 unlock.

_comment: === FOUNDRY POOL (ACT-040 to ACT-053) — ♦/construct, high damage ===

name: Slag Toss
description: Hurl molten slag. 3 ♦ damage.
_designNote: Foundry ♦ common. Wide shop distribution.

name: Furnace Breath
description: 4 ♦ damage + burn. The furnace doesn't stop.
_designNote: Foundry ♦ common. Burns on top of damage.

name: Iron Wall
description: 4 temp HP. Riveted steel. Simple.
_designNote: Foundry common defense. ♠ suit.

name: Pressure Burst
description: 5 ♣ damage. Pressurized steam explosion.
_designNote: Foundry ♣ uncommon. ♣ card in ♦ biome — the boiler surprise.

name: Scrap Shield
description: 6 def + reflect (1 dmg returned on hit). Forged from enemy scrap.
_designNote: Foundry uncommon. Reflect 1 means attacker takes 1 dmg on hit.

name: Forge Strike
description: 6 ♦ damage. Heavy hammer, hotter flame.
_designNote: Foundry ♦ uncommon. Pure damage.

name: Overclock
description: Restore 2 energy immediately. Then do something else.
_designNote: Energy ramp card. ♣ thematic — electric charge-up.

name: Meltdown
description: 8 ♦ damage + burn (2 stacks). The foundry goes critical.
_designNote: Foundry rare. 2 burn stacks = 2 dmg/turn DOT. High cost, huge payoff.

name: Rivet Shot
description: 5 damage + stun (1 turn). A rivet, fired at high speed.
_designNote: Foundry rare control. Wide shop availability at tier 1.

name: Ember Ward
description: 3 def + burn reflect (attackers take burn on hit).
_designNote: ♦ defense. Burn_reflect = attacker gets burn status when they hit you.

name: Cinder Bloom
description: 3 dmg + burn, twice. Two applications of everything.
_designNote: Foundry rare double-proc. Applies burn twice = stacks to 2.

name: Cryo Bolt
description: 6 ♠ damage + stun. Deep-water cold.
_designNote: Sealab ♠ uncommon. Solid control option.

name: Shock Net
description: 4 storm + shock (drain 1 enemy energy). Electric fishing.
_designNote: Sealab ♣ uncommon. Shock = drain enemy energy.

name: Deep Freeze
description: 5 def + freeze enemy (1 turn). Both offensive and defensive.
_designNote: Sealab ♠ uncommon. Defense + CC combo.

name: Bio Surge
description: 3 storm + drain 1 energy. Bioluminescent discharge.
_designNote: Sealab ♣ free. Free shock applicator.

name: Pressure Wave
description: 5 damage. Concussive burst from depth charges.
_designNote: Sealab ♠ uncommon. Pure damage. All shops carry it.

name: Brine Hex
description: 3 frost + freeze for 2 turns. Salt and ice.
_designNote: Sealab ♠ rare. Extended freeze. Tier 1 shop unlock.

name: Current Charge
description: 6 ♣ damage. Costs 1 battery instead of energy. Lab equipment.
_designNote: Battery-cost card. Introduces alternative resource for combat.

name: Archivist's Copy
description: Repeat the last card played, targeting this enemy.
_designNote: Copy mechanic. Powerful with any card. Admiralty tier 2.

name: Cryo Cocoon
description: 10 def + regen (3 HP/turn × 2). Encased in ice. Protected.
_designNote: Sealab ♠ rare. Massive def + sustained healing. Expensive.

_comment: === TIDE COUNCIL FACTION EXCLUSIVES (ACT-080 to ACT-084) ===

name: Scale Coat
description: 4 def + regen. Dragon scale armor. Tide Council standard issue.
_designNote: Tide exclusive tier 0. Dragon tag synergizes with Tide rep bonus.

name: Tidal Surge
description: 7 ♠ damage + stun. The tide doesn't ask permission.
_designNote: Tide exclusive tier 1. High-damage ♠ with CC.

name: Dragon's Roar
description: 9 ♦ damage. A frost faction card that uses fire. Dragons make their own rules.
_designNote: Tide tier 2 rare. ♦ card in ♠ faction — the unexpected option.

name: Sea Witch's Hex
description: Drain 3 enemy energy + 5 ♣ damage. The hex compounds.
_designNote: Tide epic. Tier 3 (Exalted) required. Massive energy denial.

name: Tide's Blessing
description: +4 HP + draw 1 card. The council looks after its own.
_designNote: Tide heal+draw uncommon. Reputation reward feel.

_comment: === THE FOUNDRY FACTION EXCLUSIVES (ACT-085 to ACT-089) ===

name: Forge Mastery
description: 5 ♦ damage + 2 armor. Attack and defend simultaneously.
_designNote: Foundry tier 0 exclusive. Efficient dual-effect card.

name: Smelter's Fury
description: 4 damage twice. Two swings from the forge hammer.
_designNote: Foundry double-hit rare. Two separate damage applications.

name: Iron Resolve
description: 7 temp HP. The foundry doesn't bend.
_designNote: Foundry tier 2 high-defense rare. Pure tanking.

name: Magma Core
description: 10 flame + burn (3 stacks). The core breaches containment.
_designNote: Foundry epic. Tier 3. Huge damage + sustained burn DOT.

name: Scrap Salvo
description: Fire 3 chunks of scrap. 2 damage each.
_designNote: Foundry multi-hit uncommon. Construct theme.

_comment: === THE ADMIRALTY FACTION EXCLUSIVES (ACT-090 to ACT-094) ===

name: Signal Flare
description: 3 ♣ damage + restore 1 energy. Efficient use of resources.
_designNote: Admiralty tier 0. ♣ damage + energy regen = self-sustaining.

name: Court Order
description: All card costs reduced by 1 energy for 3 turns. The order is law.
_designNote: Admiralty tier 2 utility. Tempo card that enables energy cost cards for free.

name: Thunder Protocol
description: 8 ♣ damage + stun. The protocol authorizes lethal force.
_designNote: Admiralty tier 1 rare. High-damage ♣ + CC.

name: Brine Blade
description: 4 ♠ damage + bleed. Salt in the wound is still water.
_designNote: Admiralty tier 0 uncommon. ♠ melee + bleed DOT.

name: Final Decree
description: 14 ♣ damage. No appeal process.
_designNote: Admiralty epic tier 3. Raw ♣ power. Big finisher.

name: Elemental Echo
description: 5 damage matching the element of the last card played.
_designNote: Element-copying epic. Rewards mono-suit decks maximally.

name: Blood Price
description: 9 damage. Costs 3 HP instead of energy. Pay with what you have.
_designNote: HP-cost card. High-damage, always playable regardless of energy state.

name: Gleaner's Gambit
description: Next card played deals double damage.
_designNote: Damage multiplier setup card. Named for the Gleaner identity.

name: Chain Fire
description: 4 damage + burn ×2, chaining to adjacent targets if present.
_designNote: Chain epic. Against single target = 4 dmg + 2 burn stacks.

name: Frost Nova
description: 6 frost + freeze for 3 turns. Time stops for them.
_designNote: ♠ epic. Long freeze = 3 free turns to deal damage or heal.

name: Arc Storm
description: 6 storm + drain 2 enemy energy. The storm has a memory.
_designNote: ♣ epic. Massive energy denial via double shock.

name: Second Wind
description: +6 HP + restore 1 energy. One more round.
_designNote: Cross-biome rare heal. Wide availability. No suit cost.

name: Void Strike
description: 12 damage. Costs 2 battery. No suit — ignores RPS.
_designNote: Battery-cost epic. High floor-8 prize. True ♠ — no suit RPS modifier.

_comment: === ♥ HEART — DEFENSIVE / SUPPORT (ACT-110 to ACT-117) — HP-sacrifice synergies ===

name: Life Ward
description: 3 defense. A gentle ward of living energy.
_designNote: ♥ baseline defense. Fills the zero-defense heart gap. Common cellar drop.

name: Blood Barrier
description: Pay 2 HP → 6 defense + regen 1. Your blood hardens into a shield.
_designNote: ♥ brace pattern: HP sacrifice → defense + sustain. Net-positive if hit lands.

name: Vital Surge
description: Pay 1 HP → restore 4 HP and draw 1. Adrenaline focus.
_designNote: ♥ cycle card. Net +3 HP + card advantage. Enables sacrifice combos.

name: Heartblood Thorns
description: Pay 3 HP → 5 defense + reflect 2. Thorns grow from your wounds.
_designNote: ♥ brace+counter. Reflect punishes the enemy for attacking into your shield.

name: Martyr's Embrace
description: Pay 4 HP → 10 defense + regen 2. Embrace the pain, outlast.
_designNote: ♥ big brace. Wall + sustain. The payoff card for sacrifice decks.

name: Crimson Counter
description: Pay 2 HP → 4 defense + 4 damage. Brace and strike.
_designNote: ♥ brace card: simultaneous defense + offense. The core 'brace' concept.

name: Transfusion
description: Heal 2 HP. Enemy bleeds 1. Take theirs, keep yours.
_designNote: ♥ sustain + status. Pairs with bleed stack builds. Fills heart status gap.

name: Final Stand
description: Pay 5 HP → 15 defense + regen 3 + reflect 2. Your last heartbeat is a fortress.
_designNote: ♥ epic brace. Massive wall when you're desperate. The 'oh god' button.

_comment: === ♣ CLUB — DEFENSIVE / CONTROL (ACT-120 to ACT-126) — Energy-cost barriers ===

name: Static Field
description: 1 energy → 3 defense + shock 1. Zap anything that gets close.
_designNote: ♣ baseline defense. Dual-purpose: shield + minor CC. Fills club defense gap.

name: Energy Shield
description: 2 energy → 7 defense. Pure energy barrier, no frills.
_designNote: ♣ efficient defense. Higher cost than ♠ Block but much better value.

name: Pulse Guard
description: 1 energy → 4 defense + draw 1. Scan, guard, adapt.
_designNote: ♣ cycle defense. Shield + cantrip. Keeps control decks flowing.

name: Neural Brace
description: 2 energy → 5 defense + stun 2. Lock their brain, lock their attack.
_designNote: ♣ brace+CC. Defense that also disrupts the enemy's next action. Control core.

name: Feedback Loop
description: 2 energy → 6 defense + reflect 2 + shock 1. Attack me? Feel it twice.
_designNote: ♣ brace+counter. Full defensive package. Punishes aggro enemies.

name: EMP Dome
description: 3 energy → 12 defense + shock 3 + stun 1. Everything stops.
_designNote: ♣ epic brace. The club's answer to ♥ Final Stand. Total lockdown.

name: Countershock
description: 1 energy → 3 defense + 3 damage. Block and counterpunch.
_designNote: ♣ brace card. Simultaneous offense+defense. Mirror of ♥ Crimson Counter.

_comment: === ♦ DIAMOND — DEFENSIVE (ACT-130 to ACT-133) — Battery-cost forge armor ===

name: Tempered Plate
description: 1 battery → 8 defense. Forge-hardened plating.
_designNote: ♦ efficient wall. Battery is scarce so the defense value is high.

name: Slag Armor
description: 1 battery → 6 defense + burn 2. Molten metal clings to whoever strikes you.
_designNote: ♦ brace+counter. Defense that punishes attackers with burn. Forge flavor.

name: Forge Brace
description: 1 battery → 4 defense + 3 damage. Hammer meets shield.
_designNote: ♦ brace card. Battery-cost defense+offense. Completes the brace trifecta ♥/♣/♦.

name: Crucible Shell
description: 2 battery → 14 defense + burn 2 + regen 1. The furnace protects its master.
_designNote: ♦ epic brace. Battery-premium fortress. Forge-themed answer to Final Stand.

_comment: === STATUS DIVERSITY (ACT-135 to ACT-142) — Fill poison, root, bleed gaps ===

name: Venom Drip
description: 2 damage + poison 2. Slow death, guaranteed.
_designNote: ♣ poison card. Only 1 poison card existed (Corpse Gas). This opens poison builds.

name: Tangle Root
description: Root 2 + 2 defense. Vines snare and shield.
_designNote: ♠ root card. Only 1 root card existed (Mold Web). Free-cost utility.

name: Serrated Edge
description: 3 damage + bleed 2. Jagged wounds don't close.
_designNote: ♠ bleed card. Only 2 bleed cards existed. This enables bleed stacking builds.

name: Corrosive Splash
description: 3 damage + poison 2 + burn 1. Acid eats through everything.
_designNote: ♣ multi-status. Poison + burn combo. High energy cost for double-DoT payoff.

name: Briar Trap
description: 4 defense + root 2 + bleed 1. Step on this. I dare you.
_designNote: ♠ brace+CC. Defense + root + bleed. The ultimate trap card. Free-cost rare.

name: Toxic Cloud
description: Poison 3 + root 1. Choking fumes pin them in place.
_designNote: ♣ heavy DoT. No direct damage — pure status. Pairs with poison stacking.

name: Hemorrhage
description: Pay 2 HP → 5 damage + bleed 3. Spill your blood to spill theirs.
_designNote: ♥ bleed enabler. HP-sacrifice + heavy bleed. Cross-pollinates ♥ sacrifice + status builds.

name: Constrict
description: 2 damage + root 2 + stun 1. Tentacles hold. You don't.
_designNote: ♣ sealab CC card. Root + stun combo. Fills marine+control tag intersection.
